APPEARANCE: HOWARD HERSHIPS-(PLAINTIFF IN PRO PER)-MOVING PARTY
TOM PROUNTZOS,ESQ 415/705-0412 FOR DEFT.-OPPOSING PARTY

RULING: ARGUED THE COURT ADOPTED THE TENTATIVE RULING. DENY- MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADING.DEFENDANT SUFFICIENTLY RESPONDED IN ITS ANSWER TO THE CLAIM (AFTER CLARYING RE STIPULATION THERE WAS A TYPO).ASSERTING A CLAIM FOR UNJUST ENRICHMENT IS BASED IN EQUITY CAUSE OF ACTION CANNOT BE DETERMINED THRU MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADING.ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT.
